name: Hand-mechanism spacer (square)
notes: Small square. Glue note on Panel D: 'Glue piece 91 to cardboard 1mm thick' — represented here as material=cardboard-1mm. Per §II.D: pieces 91 and 92 'separate piece 4, the front center column, from the minute hand wheel and the reduction gear,' and piece 92a is then glued on top of 92+91 with axle holes coincident. Labels on the square are plain 'a' and 'b' — orientation markers only, no outward subscript. The connection is expressed from piece 4's side: piece 4 carries dotted positioning guides labeled '91a' and '91b' showing where this square aligns. connections[] is therefore empty here; see piece-004.json. The '+' center mark is the minute-hand axle — the same axle threads through pieces 92, 92a, and the minute-hand wheel (piece 75) per §II.D; that axle is shared with piece 92.
